title: 50 Pack Strong Paper Bowls – 240ml Small Disposable Compostable Bagasse Bowl for Party – (4.5 x 1.77 inches) Biodegradable Microwavable Soup Bowls - Dessert Milk Salad Cereals Christmas
features: Healthy and Safety: Our 4.5 x 1.77 inches compostable paper bowls are made from food-grade materials. They have no wax lining, gluten-free and BPA-free. When you open the package, you will not smell any pungent smell, It is very safe and healthy.

Compostable and Convenience: Biodegradable bowl is the perfect solution for compostable and convenience. They are tree-free, plastic-free. Reduced energy consumption. They can be completely composted in a commercial facility within 3-6 months.

Unparalleled Strength: Sugarcane fiber has a natural strength, These heavy-duty bagasse bowls are stronger and more durable. You can use it in the microwave and fridge. They have good oil resistance and soaking resistance.

Variety of Functions: Disposable bowl is the perfect choice for your party or picnic. You can use these compostable bowls for all kinds of hot and cold food, such as soup, desserts, salad, snacks, desserts. Bagasse bowls can help you reduce cleaning time.

Suitable for any Occasions: 240ml/8oz disposable sugarcane bowls are perfect for daily meals, birthdays, camping, picnics, wedding. When your friends are together, you don't need to worry about cleaning work, free your hands from washing dishes.
